summary: Comprehensive testing of Reviews CMS and Additional Fields features. Backend: 17/17 tests passed covering POST/GET/DELETE /api/reviews endpoints with auth, validation, and filtering. Frontend: All features working - Admin Reviews page with table, Add Review modal with all fields, review creation/deletion, Admin Sellers Additional Fields section with 8 fields, Supplier Profile Reviews tab showing real computed stats (4.5 avg, 2 reviews, distribution bars, sub-ratings) and individual review cards.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/reviews requires authentication (returns 403 without token)
Backend: POST /api/reviews validates required fields (seller_id, customer_name, rating)
Backend: POST /api/reviews validates rating is between 1 and 5
Backend: POST /api/reviews returns 404 for non-existent seller
Backend: POST /api/reviews creates review successfully with all fields
Backend: GET /api/reviews requires authentication
Backend: GET /api/reviews returns all reviews
Backend: GET /api/reviews?seller_id=xxx filters by seller correctly
Backend: DELETE /api/reviews/{id} requires authentication
Backend: DELETE /api/reviews/{id} returns 404 for non-existent review
Backend: DELETE /api/reviews/{id} deletes review successfully
Backend: GET /api/suppliers/{slug}/profile returns review_stats with average, count, distribution, sub_ratings
Backend: GET /api/suppliers/{slug}/profile returns reviews array with buyer_name, rating, text, date
Backend: review_stats computed from real reviews data (verified count and average match)
Backend: PUT /api/sellers/{id} accepts and persists additional fields
Backend: GET /api/sellers returns sellers with all additional fields
Frontend: Admin Reviews page loads at /admin/reviews with table of existing reviews
Frontend: Admin Reviews page has Add Review button
Frontend: Admin Reviews modal opens with all fields (seller dropdown, customer name, company, location, date, star rating clicker, review text, verified toggle)
Frontend: Admin Reviews modal saves review successfully
Frontend: Admin Reviews page can delete a review
Frontend: Admin Sellers edit modal has Additional Fields section
Frontend: Additional Fields includes all 8 fields (established_year, monthly_capacity, employee_count, factory_size, turnover_range, certifications, export_markets, gst_number)
Frontend: Supplier Profile Reviews tab shows real review data (4.5 avg, 2 reviews)
Frontend: Supplier Profile Reviews tab shows 5 rating distribution bars
Frontend: Supplier Profile Reviews tab shows 4 sub-ratings (quality, communication, on_time_delivery, packaging)
Frontend: Supplier Profile Reviews tab shows individual review cards with name, company, rating, text, date, verified badge
critical_code_review_comments: Reviews CMS implementation is clean with proper validation and error handling
Additional Fields properly integrated into SellerCreate, SellerUpdate, and Seller Pydantic models
supplier_profile_router.py correctly computes review_stats from actual reviews collection
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Frontend forms handle comma-separated arrays (certifications, export_markets) correctly
seed_data_creation: 2 test reviews already exist in DB for Pali Mills seller (FashionMark Apparels 5-star, Stitch Label Co 4-star)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reviews CMS and Additional Fields features fully tested and working. Admin Reviews page at /admin/reviews allows CRUD operations on reviews. Admin Sellers edit modal has Additional Fields section with 8 fields. Supplier Profile Reviews tab at /suppliers/{category}/{city}/{slug}#reviews shows real computed stats from reviews collection. Test reviews cleaned up after testing.

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/reviews: 200 OK - Returns all reviews with auth
api_endpoints_tested.PUT /api/sellers/{id}: 200 OK - Updates seller with additional fields
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/suppliers/{slug}/profile: 200 OK - Returns review_stats and reviews array
